heading: Create your SynCode account
sub: Join your peers and start practicing technical interviews together.
cardDescription: Set up your profile to start practicing with your peers.

validation.usernameMinLength: Username must be at least 3 characters.
validation.usernameMaxLength: Username must be 30 characters or fewer.
validation.usernamePattern: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
validation.reviewFields: Please review the highlighted fields and try again.

toast.accountCreated: Account created successfully. Please sign in.

error.checkDetails: Please check your details and try again.
error.emailInUse: This email is already in use.
error.cannotCreate: We could not create your account right now.
